action.description: May logistics execute the controlled export?

context.action_boundary: May logistics execute the controlled export?
context.anomaly_observed: The packet includes market-screening approval and an export execution license.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-PAV-066 exports controlled module PM-8 to Norway for end user Noro Labs on 2026-06-30.
Market-screening approval MKT-PAV-066 approves Norway market analysis only; it is not export execution authority.
Export execution license LIC-PAV-066 covers module PM-8 and destination Norway; end user Noro Labs execution authority remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export execution license matches item, destination, end user, and shipment date before export.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
